name: 6th Grain
description: Website that provides different tools to manage crops using Geographical Information Systems.

taxonomy.category: 6th Grain data coming soon Updated on June 11, 2024 · Created on July 28, 2017 6th Grain Website that provides different tools to manage crops using Geographical Information Systems. Developed By 6th Grain Tested By 6th Grain Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Product Description 6th Grain is an agricultural analysis platform that takes farmer-provided data and combines it with remote sensing and weather forecasting to provide farmers with advice to maximize yield and minimize inputs. The manufacturer headquarters are in different parts around the world: USA, India, Russia and Mauritania. Target SDGs SDG 2: Zero Hunger SDG 1: No Poverty Target Users (Target Impact Group) Public Sector Agencies, NGOs Distributors / Implementing Organizations - Syngenta - BASF - Arysta - Sucden Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Agribotix FarmLens and aWhere .
